title: Fix duplicate highlights on PDF download (mirror dedupe)
description:
Downloaded plan PDFs still showed stacked duplicate highlight strokes even after flat content-stream burn (dbg38–39). Runtime trace showed 49 export lines for 7 board highlights — seven viewer mirror copies per highlight with the same piece coordinates but different pageIds.

Fix (dbg40): Legacy download now dedupes mirrors by mirroredFrom + piece storageKey. Export geometry dedupe uses piece storageKey + rx/ry instead of viewer pageId, so one stroke per highlight per PDF piece. Debug trace still active for verification.

Hard-refresh PipeSync after deploy (Ctrl+Shift+R). After download, run __hpDownloadTraceDump() in console (type allow pasting first in Edge). Expect allLinesCount near board line count, dupGeo empty, pieceLinesCount and drawableCount much lower on highlighted pieces.

Who is affected: Private OVH server. SaaS unchanged until you publish a platform release.
changeLog: Dedupe viewer mirror highlights by mirroredFrom + piece storageKey on export.
Piece-aware geometry key for download burn (storageKey + coords, not pageId).
Per-piece dedupe passes pieceSk into export dedupe before PDF burn.
Download trace helpers available at boot (__hpDownloadTraceDump / Copy).
Cache bust dbg42 for app.js and pipesync-boot.js.
